name: @piflow/docker
description: Pi Flow ↔ local Docker connector — the LOCAL container sandbox backend for @piflow/core's sandbox seam, packaged as a CHOOSE-TO-INSTALL extension. `npm i @piflow/docker` and `piflowctl run --sandbox docker` boots one local Docker container per run (per-node workdir subtrees) from the SAME pi node-runtime image the cloud backends use — the offline, free mirror of the Daytona/E2B path (same image, same credential injection, same tool binding; no cloud account). Talks to the `docker` CLI only — no daemon-client dependency.
author: blueif16
